entries.title: Former Infosys chief has a new startup that wants to challenge the IT services world
entries.description: Backed by Mayfield and Aramco Ventures, Vishal Sikka’s new venture brings together veterans from SAP, Infosys, and VianAI.

entries.title: Cerebras stock plunges after earnings as CEO says margin outlook was misunderstood
entries.description: In its first earnings report since going public, the AI chipmaker forecast a narrower gross margin in its core business, scaring investors.

entries.title: AI was supposed to kill engineering jobs, but new data suggests they’re the most resilient
entries.description: While AI dominates the layoff narrative, engineers are actually making up a larger share of new hires, according to SignalFire data.

entries.title: AI researchers continue to leave Google for its rivals
entries.description: Top AI researchers Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel are leaving Google for Anthropic, following departures from top scientists Noam Shazeer and John Jumper.

entries.title: The memory chip crunch is paying off for this US company
entries.description: Revenue quadrupled to $41.45 billion compared with the same period a year ago. The company's profit, meanwhile, rose from $1.88 billion to an incredible $28.2 billion year-over-year.

entries.title: Companies are scrambling to stop employees from maxing out AI budgets with small tasks
entries.description: The tokenmaxxing era was brief. We now appear to be entering the era of token rationing.

entries.title: Facebook rolls out an AI companion app for creators
entries.description: The new app, which is currently being tested with select creators, will have Facebook's recently launched AI creator assistant built into it.

entries.title: Agility Robotics plans to go public via SPAC in a $2.5B deal
entries.description: Agility Robotics, the humanoid robotics startup that spun out of Oregon State University in 2015, expects to generate $620 million in proceeds.

entries.title: Figma adds code layers, support for animations, more AI features in new update
entries.description: Figma's update adds a new code layer, support for motion and shaders, and the ability to create custom plug-ins for various tasks using AI.

entries.title: OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom
entries.description: Named Jalapeño, the new processor was designed specifically for the unique needs of OpenAI's inference systems.

entries.title: 3 days left to save up to $190 on your TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 pass
entries.description: You have just 3 days left to save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 before Early Bird rates end on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register today.

entries.title: India’s MoEngage bets that the future of marketing is millions of AI agents
entries.description: The all-cash deal gives MoEngage access to technology that assigns AI agents to individual customers.

entries.title: Anthropic’s Claude Tag is learning your company, one Slack message at a time
entries.description: Anthropic’s new Claude Tag brings an always-on AI teammate to Slack. But beyond productivity, the feature is a strategic play to capture organizational context, institutional knowledge, and enterprise

entries.title: General Intuition’s $2.3B bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world
entries.description: General Intuition has raised $320 million to scale AI trained on millions of hours of gameplay, betting action data can help AI develop something closer to human intuition.

entries.title: Databricks’ former AI chief thinks he can cut AI’s power bill by 1,000x
entries.description: Un0 is an image-generation system tool that shows for the first time how the company's technology can replicate conventional AI systems.

entries.title: Netris raises $15M Series A from a16z to help AI neoclouds go live faster
entries.description: Netris provides software that runs on network switches, and offers a platform that helps neocloud operators reduce the time it takes to go live.

entries.title: 2 days left to save up to $190: Join 1,000+ founders and investors at TechCrunch Founder Summit
entries.description: Two days left to lock in your spot at TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 and save up to $190 before Early Bird rates expire on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register today.

entries.title: Adobe acquires image and video enhancement tool maker Topaz Labs
entries.description: Adobe said that it will integrate Topaz Labs' tools across its apps.

entries.title: Amazon ups India bet with fresh $13B AI infrastructure investment
entries.description: Amazon’s latest India investment comes as global tech companies race to expand AI infrastructure in the country.
